description_long: This object depicts a male adult with light brown hair and a trimmed mustache and beard, wearing a dark green shirt. The figure is shown from multiple angles, revealing a realistic human head and upper torso with naturalistic facial features and hair texture. The skin tone is fair, and the hair is styled neatly, swept back from the forehead. The eyes are light brown, and the eyebrows are well-defined. The figure's posture is upright, and the neck and shoulders are proportionate to the head. No visible wheelchair frame, wheels, or mobility aids are present in any view.
description: A realistic male adult with light brown hair, facial hair, and a dark green shirt, shown upright with natural facial features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, light brown hair, mustache, and dark green shirt.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the side of the face, ear, and hair swept back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair texture, and neck.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the side of the face, ear, and jawline.
attribute_seating_posture: upright with head facing forward and arms not visible
